headline: Northern Trust (NTRS) Appointed for Fund Administration by TirNua Capital Partners
summary: Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ:NTRS) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 22, Northern Trust announced its appointment by TirNua Capital Partners to provide fund administration, depositary, and banking services for the firm’s inaugural infrastructure fund. The fund, which recently secured €340 million in commitments at its first […]
